CHANGE DIR
% cd Documents\STEM_ED_SIGNALS\testbook2

GITHUB
update files in github
git pull origin main
git add .
git commit -m "Update site content"
git push origin main

status checks:

git status
git log --oneline -5
git branch

A quick one-liner that often works when you've only changed content is:
git add . && git commit -m "Update website" && git push origin main

RUN JUPYTERBOOK LOCALLY
